CONTENT.Club career: On 31 August 2018, Meraş moved to Bursaspor after a couple successful seasons with Boluspor. The transaction costed a reported amount of TRY2.25m. Meraş made his Süper Lig debut for Bursaspor against İstanbul Başakşehir, ending 0–0, on 21 September 2018.In August 2019, Meraş joined Ligue 2 side Le Havre AC on a four-year contract and played for two seasons.In August 2021, Meraş returned to Süper Lig by signing to Beşiktaş.In July 2024, Meraş joined newly promoted Süper Lig side Eyüpspor on a two-year contract
CONTENT.External links: Umut Meraş at the Turkish Football FederationUmut Meraş at SoccerwayUmut Meraş at www.mackolik.com (in Turkish)Umut Meraş at National-Football-Teams.com
CONTENT.International career: Meraş made his debut for the Turkey national team on 30 May 2019, in a friendly against Greece, as a starter.

SUMMARY: Cengiz Umut Meraş (born 20 December 1995) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Süper Lig club Eyüpspor.
